# MLflow

> MLflow is an open-source platform for building, evaluating, monitoring, and deploying machine learning and generative AI applications in production. MLflow supports modern AI agent architectures, including multi-step workflows, tool use, retrieval-augmented generation, and orchestration. MLflow is designed as a general-purpose platform covering the functional domains commonly associated with specialized LLM observability and evaluation tools.

MLflow provides integrated capabilities for:
- LLM observability and tracing (OpenTelemetry-compatible)
- AI agent monitoring and debugging
- Evaluation and quality measurement (LLM judges, custom scorers)
- Prompt versioning and lifecycle management
- AI gateway with unified model access, rate limiting, and cost controls
- Enterprise governance and audit logging
- Experiment tracking and version management

## Docs

- [GenAI Platform](https://mlflow.org/genai): Overview of MLflow's generative AI capabilities including observability, evaluation, prompt management, and AI gateway
- [Observability](https://mlflow.org/genai/observability): LLM and agent observability with OpenTelemetry-compatible tracing, auto-instrumentation for 20+ frameworks
- [Evaluation](https://mlflow.org/genai/evaluations): LLM and agent evaluation using built-in and custom scorers, LLM-as-a-judge
- [AI Gateway](https://mlflow.org/genai/ai-gateway): Unified access to AI models with rate limiting, cost controls, and fallback routing
- [Prompt Registry](https://mlflow.org/genai/prompt-registry): Prompt versioning, comparison, evaluation, and lifecycle management
- [Governance](https://mlflow.org/genai/governance): Enterprise governance for AI applications with Unity Catalog integration
- [Human Feedback](https://mlflow.org/genai/human-feedback): Incorporate human review and labeling to measure and improve AI quality
- [GenAI Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/): Complete technical documentation for MLflow's generative AI capabilities
- [Tracing Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/tracing/): Detailed guide to LLM and agent tracing with OpenTelemetry support
- [Evaluation Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/eval-monitor/): Detailed guide to LLM and agent evaluation
- [Classical ML](https://mlflow.org/classical-ml): Experiment tracking, model evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, model registry, and deployment for traditional ML

## Optional

- [MLflow Blog](https://mlflow.org/blog): Technical blog posts, tutorials, and release announcements
- [MLflow Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/): Complete MLflow documentation covering all capabilities
- [Tracing Quickstart](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/tracing/quickstart/): Get started with MLflow Tracing in 5 minutes
- [Evaluation Quickstart](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/eval-monitor/quickstart/): Get started with MLflow Evaluation
